purpose: Capture cautious older-adult and family need signals from Hinata support conversations without over-claiming certainty.

signal_fields.name: speaker_type
signal_fields.description: Who seems to be speaking in the conversation.

signal_fields.name: need_category
signal_fields.description: Primary elder/family need category if one is reasonably supported.

signal_fields.name: secondary_need_categories
signal_fields.description: Optional secondary categories when ambiguity should be preserved.

signal_fields.name: concern_intensity
signal_fields.description: How strong the concern feels from the expressed language.

signal_fields.name: mobility_impact
signal_fields.description: How much day-to-day movement seems affected.

signal_fields.name: emotional_concern
signal_fields.description: How prominent the emotional worry or unease is.

signal_fields.name: dignity_independence_concern
signal_fields.description: Whether autonomy, dignity, or reluctance to be taken care of is present.

signal_fields.name: family_burden_concern
signal_fields.description: Whether burden on family is part of the user's concern.

signal_fields.name: confidence_level
signal_fields.description: How confident the user sounds about going out, choosing support, or moving forward.

signal_fields.name: readiness_for_solution_discussion
signal_fields.description: Whether the user seems ready for concrete solution/product/service talk.

signal_fields.name: openness_to_product_service_discussion
signal_fields.description: How open the user appears to be toward product or service discussion.

signal_fields.name: trial_explanation_needed
signal_fields.description: Whether trial, demo, or calm explanation looks important before moving forward.

signal_fields.name: practical_constraints
signal_fields.description: Concrete constraints such as stairs, distance, storage, clinic routes, taxis, or scheduling.

signal_fields.name: user_goal
signal_fields.description: What the user seems to be looking for in this stage of the conversation.

signal_fields.name: conversation_stage
signal_fields.description: Conversation stage inferred cautiously from thread progression.

signal_fields.name: extraction_confidence
signal_fields.description: How confident the system should be in the extracted signal bundle.

signal_fields.name: evidence_excerpt_policy
signal_fields.description: How to store evidence safely and minimally.

signal_fields.name: evidence_excerpt
signal_fields.description: Optional short supporting excerpt when policy allows.

signal_fields.name: interpretation_note
signal_fields.description: Short cautious note explaining what was inferred and what remains ambiguous.
